name: Impossible Green Bean Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the green beans lengthwise into strips.
2. Process the mushroom stems and pieces in a can (4 oz) until drained.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
4. Grease a pie plate measuring 10 x 1 1/2 inches.
5. In a pot, bring about 1 inch of salted water (½ teaspoon salt per cup of water) to a boil and add the beans. Cook for 5 minutes uncovered.
6. Cover and cook until tender, 5 to 10 additional minutes, then drain.
7. Mix the cooked beans, mushrooms, onion, garlic, and cheese in the pie plate.
8. In a blender or with a hand beater, beat the remaining ingredients until smooth (15 seconds in the blender or 1 minute by hand).
9. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie plate.
10. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a knife inserted between the center and edge comes out clean.
11. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
This recipe makes 6 to 8 servings.
